# North Soft Strip

> Liverpool soft strip contractors for houses, flats, shops and light commercial units across Merseyside. Fully insured, clean, fast turnaround, free quotes.

North Soft Strip is a Liverpool-based specialist in residential and light commercial soft strip: careful removal of kitchens, bathrooms, ceilings, partitions, fixtures, fittings and floor coverings, plus full licensed waste clearance. We do not undertake heavy structural demolition.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, areas covered, process and reviews.
- [About](/about): Who we are, how we work, our clean-site guarantee.
- [Services](/services): Full range of soft strip and clearance services.
- [Projects](/projects): Before, during and completed project stages.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos of house, flat, kitchen, bathroom, ceiling, shop and completed jobs.
- [Areas](/areas): Liverpool, Wirral, Bootle, Knowsley, Sefton, Southport, St Helens and wider Merseyside.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions on soft strip, insurance, waste and timings.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email and map.
- [Quote](/quote): Free, no-obligation written quote request.

## Services

- [House Strip Out](/services/house-strip-out): Full residential soft strip for terraces, semis and detached houses.
- [Kitchen Strip Out](/services/kitchen-strip-out): Units, worktops, tiles and appliances removed and site left prep-ready.
- [Bathroom Strip Out](/services/bathroom-strip-out): Suites, tiles and pipework taken back to bare walls.
- [Ceiling Removal](/services/ceiling-removal): Plasterboard and suspended ceilings taken down safely.
- [Commercial Strip Out](/services/commercial-strip-out): Shops, salons, cafés and boutique offices.
- [Site Clearance](/services/site-clearance): Licensed waste removal with full duty-of-care paperwork.
